title: Login Issue
description: Customer cannot log into the system despite entering correct credentials.

title: Payment Failure
description: Payment process stops at checkout and does not complete.

title: Password Reset Request
description: Customer needs assistance resetting the account password.

title: Dashboard Bug
description: Statistics on the dashboard are not updating properly.

title: Email Notification Error
description: Customer is not receiving notification emails after ticket updates.

title: Account Deactivation
description: Customer wants to permanently deactivate the account.

title: Slow Page Loading
description: Customer reports that pages take too long to load.

title: Profile Update Problem
description: User cannot update profile information in the settings page.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after login.

title: Feature Request
description: Customer suggested adding dark mode to the application.
